description: Discover this exceptional residence for sale in the highly sought-after area of ‘s-Gravenwezel, nestled along the prestigious Hofse Velden. Priced at €1,395,000, this stunning property presents a rare opportunity to acquire a spacious and elegant home in one of the most idyllic and exclusive neighborhoods in the region. Situated in a tranquil, green environment characterized by generous plots, mature trees, and luxurious villa-style architecture, this residence offers the perfect blend of privacy, comfort, and natural beauty. The location is distinguished by its peaceful dead-end street that connects to a scenic walking path encircling the historic moats ‘s-Gravenwezel Castle. Imagine starting your day with a peaceful morning walk or unwinding in the evening amidst lush greenery, all within a serene setting that fosters a high quality of life. Despite its quiet residential ambiance, the property benefits from excellent connectivity to nearby towns and major roads. The charming center ‘s-Gravenwezel is just a short drive away, featuring a selection of high-quality shops, specialty stores, restaurants, and educational institutions. Furthermore, Schilde and Brasschaat are easily accessible, making this an ideal location for families or professionals seeking both tranquility and convenience. For commuters, quick routes to Antwerp via the E313 and E19 ensure effortless access to the city’s vibrant urban life while maintaining the benefits of a peaceful suburban home. This impressive residence boasts a total living area of 336 square meters, offering ample space for families. Built in 1955 and maintained in excellent condition, it features four bedrooms, three toilets, and two bathrooms—perfect for accommodating family members or guests comfortably. The interior includes modern amenities such as double-glazed windows ensuring energy efficiency and enhanced security, complemented by a gas heating system that provides reliable warmth throughout the year. A dedicated laundry room adds practicality to daily life, while an alarm system enhances safety. The property also includes a garage with space for one vehicle, providing convenient off-street parking. Outside, you’ll find a beautiful garden and terrace ideal for outdoor entertaining or relaxing in nature’s embrace. The vast plot covers over 5,251 square meters with a frontage of 60 meters, offering plenty of space for future expansion or landscaping possibilities. The four-sided construction emphasizes durability, and the presence of four façades ensures abundant natural light and ventilation throughout the home. Classified as a residential area with a primary use for living purposes, this property is well-positioned within a quiet yet highly accessible locale, perfectly suited for those seeking both comfort and strategic location. If you are interested in this unique opportunity to own a prestigious property in ‘s-Gravenwezel, contact us today atTel03 344 88 88or via email atContactfor further information or to schedule an onsite visit. Our team is ready to assist you with all your questions and guide you through the purchasing process. Don’t miss the chance to secure this exceptional residence in one of the region’s most desirable neighborhoods—reach out now to learn more about this outstanding offer and discover how it can become your new home.*

description: Discover the epitome of luxurious living with this exquisite villa for sale in Schilde, a truly distinguished property that offers both elegance and comfort. Priced at €1,595,000, this splendid residence stands out with its impressive 540 square meters of living space, meticulously designed to cater to a refined lifestyle. Constructed in 1974 and currently available for immediate possession upon signing the deed, this villa is an exceptional opportunity for discerning buyers seeking a blend of sophistication and practicality. The property's generous layout features five bedrooms and four bathrooms, making it ideal for families or those who desire ample space for guests, work, or leisure. The inclusion of two garages and parking for an additional two vehicles enhances convenience, while the sizable plot of 3,896 m² provides plenty of outdoor space for relaxation and entertainment. The interior of the villa is characterized by high-quality finishes and a thoughtful distribution aimed at maximizing comfort. The main living area boasts a warm, inviting ambiance with large windows that flood the space with natural light, highlighting the beautiful oak parquet flooring. An open fireplace adds a cozy touch, perfect for enjoying relaxing evenings. The kitchen is a true highlight, featuring an Italian design with a natural stone work surface, a central island, and top-of-the-line appliances — a culinary enthusiast's dream. Adjacent to the kitchen is a practical utility room with extra appliances and storage options, ensuring functionality without sacrificing style. One of the standout features of this property is the wellness area, which includes a heated indoor swimming pool with an automatic roller shutter, a sunshower, a Japanese toilet, a bathtub, and large sliding glass doors that open fully to reveal views of the lush, south-facing garden. The outdoor space is designed for enjoyment and relaxation, featuring sun terraces, an overcovered lounge with a fireplace, fruit trees, and full fencing with lighting for privacy and ambiance. Upstairs, the residence offers three bedrooms on parquet flooring, each equipped with air conditioning to ensure optimal comfort during warmer months. The master suite includes a dressing room and a nearly new luxurious bathroom in marble, with an additional staircase leading to the fully finished attic that can serve as a versatile extra space. A separate studio apartment above the pool provides an excellent guest or work area with its own sitting corner, kitchenette, bedroom, and open bathroom — offering independence and flexibility within the property. The entire estate is complemented by energy-efficient features, including an EPC score of 193 kWh/m² per year and an electrical installation certificate. Located in one of Schilde’s most desirable residential districts, this property benefits from peaceful surroundings while maintaining easy access to the city center, schools, and local amenities. With its elegant architecture, outstanding amenities, and generous outdoor areas, this villa presents a rare opportunity to own a prestigious residence in Belgium’s scenic suburbs. Contact us today to arrange a viewing and experience firsthand the exceptional lifestyle this remarkable property can offer.* This text was generated using an artificial intelligence.

This exceptional property located in Schilde offers a rare opportunity to acquire a luxurious and spacious residence boasting a remarkable blend of modern comfort and scenic views. Priced at €1,185,000, this sophisticated apartment combines contemporary design with functional elegance across a generous living space of 364 square meters, complemented by a garage, carport, and a substantial basement area of 182 square meters. Built in 2015, this residence is meticulously designed to provide a high standard of living, featuring an array of impressive amenities that cater to both relaxation and entertainment. Upon entering, you are greeted by a thoughtfully laid-out interior that highlights comfort and practicality. The ground floor welcomes you with an entrance hall accessible via the garage or side door, leading to an elevator or staircase that transports you effortlessly to the upper levels. The first floor reveals a large living area of approximately 42 square meters divided into cozy zones–a TV corner with a gas fireplace and a dedicated office space–an inviting setting for daily life or entertaining guests. The adjacent formal sitting area, approximately 27 square meters, offers panoramic views of the canal, creating an idyllic backdrop for unwinding or socializing. The open-plan kitchen, around 36 square meters with a natural stone floor, is equipped with high-end appliances including a double sink, induction cooktop, dishwasher, and ample storage options. A conveniently connected utility room of approximately 10 square meters houses additional appliances such as a combination oven and refrigerator, with access to an inviting covered terrace fitted with a heat source–perfect for outdoor dining while enjoying the picturesque canal vista. The upper level features three bedrooms, including a master suite of about 21 square meters that grants access to a stunning 24 square meter sun terrace overlooking the water. The master bedroom has its own luxurious bathroom with a walk-in shower, a sunken bathtub, and dual sinks. A spacious dressing room of approximately 18 square meters and a large laundry room of about 14 square meters complete this level’s appeal. The remaining two bedrooms measure approximately 18 and 22 square meters respectively, both featuring parquet flooring and access to the terrace, making them ideal for family or guests. Additional amenities include a guest toilet, built-in storage solutions, and beautiful wrought-iron doors that add character to the space. The basement offers versatile potential–whether you envision a hobby room, fitness area, or entertainment space–thanks to its expansive layout and included wine cellar. Set in a tranquil environment with direct access to the canal, this residence offers two large terraces (each 24 square meters) for outdoor enjoyment and relaxation. The well-maintained front garden features an driveway leading to the garage and additional parking spaces outside, while a back gate provides straightforward access to the canal for leisure walks along the waterway. Notable features include energy-efficient elements such as underfloor heating in all rooms, low EPC value of 87.82 kWh/m²/year, automatic sunshades on the canal-facing side, fly screens throughout, and air conditioning in every room–ensuring comfort year-round. This ready-to-move-in property epitomizes modern Belgian living in a peaceful yet accessible location, making it an ideal choice for discerning buyers seeking luxury and tranquility in Schilde. August Dierckxlaan 34 - Schilde House to modernize (121 m²) with 3 bedrooms, garage and garden (150 m²) in Schilde. In the August Dierckxlaan you live in a quiet and child-friendly residential area a stone's throw from the village center. All daily amenities such as stores, services and bus stops are within easy reach. Moreover, by car you enjoy a quick connection to the freeway, allowing you to drive towards surrounding towns or cities in no time. The semi-detached building offers a pleasant living area of 121 m² and features 3 bedrooms, a detached garage and a low-maintenance south garden of 150 m². Thanks to the practical layout and the solid basic structure, you have a home with a strong foundation and plenty of opportunities to adapt and modernize. You enter in the entrance-/trap hall with at the end a separate guest toilet. To the right is the cozy living room (34 m²), which leads to the separate kitchen (9 m²) with basic equipment. Then there is a practical storage/laundry room (8 m²), which provides access to the garden. On the upper floor you discover 3 (bed)rooms of 5 m², 13 m² and 16 m² and a compact bathroom (3 m²) with sink and shower. Extra storage space is available in the attic. Are you looking for a house with lots of potential in an excellent location near the center? Do not miss this opportunity! Habitable surface 121 m² ref: gross floor pop. EPC certificate For more info or a free estimate visitwww.hansimmo.be
